title: Fix reflection improvement suggestions generic guidance

tasks.title: Implement category-specific reflection improvement suggestion mapping with safe generic fallback for unknown categories.
tasks.verification: Implemented category-specific improvement suggestion mapping for tool_gap, docs_gap, missing_capability, ux_friction, and provider_specific with a safe unclassified fallback. Suggestions are deduplicated and retry events now get actionable guardrail/test guidance.
tasks.summary: Added deterministic category-to-suggestion mapping and buildImprovementSuggestions helper; replaced generic friction-count suggestion.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added deterministic category-to-suggestion mapping and buildImprovementSuggestions helper; replaced generic friction-count suggestion.

tasks.title: Add failing reflection tests for representative known categories producing category-specific actionable improvement suggestions and unknown category fallback.
tasks.verification: Added failing-then-green reflection regression for category-specific suggestions. Red phase showed generic suggestions only (`Retry events detected...`, `4 friction items identified...`). Green verifies tooling, documentation, capability, and UX suggestions and rejects generic friction-count boilerplate.
tasks.summary: Added reflection test covering representative known categories and unknown fallback path through deterministic suggestion mapping.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added reflection test covering representative known categories and unknown fallback path through deterministic suggestion mapping.

tasks.title: Run focused reflection tests and plugin check; document verification evidence.
tasks.verification: pnpm vitest run src/tools/reflection.test.ts --reporter=verbose; pnpm run check

proposal.approval_evidence: Approved via structured ADV_ATC_RESPONSE on GitHub issue #97.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery completed from issue #97 and reflection output scope. Known reflection categories need actionable category-specific suggestions; unknown categories keep safe generic fallback. No conflict or tradeoff found.

design.approval_evidence: Design completed autonomously. Plan adds category-specific reflection suggestions with safe fallback and regression coverage. No HITL tradeoff, conflict, or contract compromise.

planning.approval_evidence: Planning approved via structured ADV_ATC_RESPONSE on GitHub issue #97.

execution.approval_evidence: Execution complete. Added category-specific reflection improvement suggestion mapping for known friction categories with safe fallback for unknown/unclassified categories. Replaced generic friction-count guidance. Verification: `pnpm vitest run src/tools/reflection.test.ts --reporter=verbose` passed (2 tests); `pnpm run check` passed.

acceptance.approval_evidence: Batch acceptance approved via GH ATC_RESPONSE for all bug changes
